title: EQ - Custom EQ, change values on the sliders
scenario: Custom EQ sliders can have their values changed successfully in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and select the connected Poly audio device.
3. Go to Device Settings → Audio Settings → Equalizer.
4. Tap on 'Custom' EQ preset to enter the Custom EQ screen.
5. For each frequency band slider (e.g., 32Hz, 64Hz, 125Hz, 250Hz, 500Hz, 1kHz, 2kHz, 4kHz, 8kHz, 16kHz), drag the slider up and down to different positions.
6. Observe whether the slider moves smoothly and the value changes accordingly.
7. Repeat step 5 for all available sliders on the Custom EQ screen.
expected: All sliders in the Custom EQ screen can be adjusted smoothly, and their values change successfully without any sticking, lag, or unresponsiveness.
